note: VERIFIED. The mathematical content is correct on all three claims: (1) Correct invocation of Node 1.3 giving dim_R(pi_phi(A)'^{sa}) <= m+1. (2) The dimension equality dim_C(M) = dim_R(M^{sa}) is correct: M = M^{sa} + i*M^{sa} as a direct sum of real subspaces, so dim_R(M) = 2*dim_R(M^{sa}) = 2*dim_C(M), giving dim_C(M) = dim_R(M^{sa}). Verified on M_n(C). (3) The commutant is always a von Neumann algebra by the double commutant theorem; the alternative finite-dimensional-implies-closed argument is also valid (Rudin FA Thm 1.21). Minor issue: missing dependency on Node 1.3 (filed as challenge ch-a0d0c6a2022a3d52, non-blocking).
